name: bandit.extortion_first_demand_fight_mcw
description: Bandit shakedown/toll-control regression: resume the McWilliams/Basecamp local-contact fixture, prove the bandit-only Pay/Fight demand surface, choose Fight, and require same-run branch logging.

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the McWilliams bandit local-contact fixture before toll-control proof begins; this is startup/load footing only

steps.label: advance_299_turns_to_gate_edge
steps.expected_immediate_state: bounded turn advance reaches the shakedown gate edge; proof is deferred to the same-run demand-surface artifact after the final turn

steps.label: advance_final_turn_to_first_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: Bandit shakedown dialogue window is visible with player-facing Pay/Fight choices after the final local-contact turn

steps.label: audit_first_demand_surface_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the bandit camp-style local gate and pay/fight shakedown surface with reachable goods and demanded toll
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names camp_style profile, open_shakedown posture, reachable goods, demanded toll, visible Pay/Fight responses, and the NPC trade UI payment bridge

steps.label: choose_fight
steps.expected_visible_fact: fight branch was selected from the visible bandit shakedown menu; immediate screen should return to gameplay/combat-forward contact rather than silently paying

steps.label: audit_fight_branch_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the selected fight branch for the first bandit shakedown
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names the fight branch and preserves demanded/reachable values

evidence_contract.claim: ordinary bandit local contact reaches a player-visible Pay/Fight shakedown surface and the fight branch is recorded as a distinct same-run outcome
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for shakedown behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No shakedown/toll-control fight credit unless startup/load, visible Pay/Fight demand surface, same-run camp_style/open_shakedown artifact, and same-run fight branch artifact are all green/matched.
